task_completion.description: Verify that an expense account named 'Volume Discounts' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Volume Discounts' account in the Chart of Accounts, Settings, or available in the Account dropdown menu on the Credit Note form.

task_completion.description: Verify that a credit note is being issued to the customer 'Alfreds Futterkiste'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Customer field on the Credit Note form or view screen displays 'Alfreds Futterkiste'.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note has today's date and the description 'Q1 Volume Rebate'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date field shows the current date and the Description field contains 'Q1 Volume Rebate'.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note amount is 500.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Unit Price, Amount, or Total field on the credit note shows 500.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note line item is allocated to the 'Volume Discounts' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Account column or field for the line item on the credit note is set to 'Volume Discounts'.

task_completion.description: Verify that no inventory item is selected for the credit note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Item or Inventory Item column/field on the credit note line item is empty or unselected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Manager.io web application running in a browser, with the agent interacting with its UI elements.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl, API requests, or sqlite3 commands modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just write the expected output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual Manager.io form fields, not a text editor or note-taking app.
